untranslatable_reason: Pipe pattern requires measurement of price difference between two identified peaks against median. This multi-bar peak identification and median comparison logic cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern inherently requires pattern recognition across multiple bars to identify the two peaks and calculate their differential relative to a rolling median—functionality beyond point-in-time indicator thresholds. Approximation provided uses range and ATR as proxies for volatility/price movement magnitude.
